The '''''Long Run''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Barge driver|barge]] [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[Boo Rawl]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], it was used to steal a [[Colony Class 23669 power generator]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] on [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] while disguised as an Imperial barge, ''[[36DD]]''. It was modified by Rawl who upgraded the [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] and removed some of the cargo and living space in the bow to create space for a hidden [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] mount.

==Appearances==
